user.title: NOAA It All Setup
user.description:
Detected Home Assistant Home location: {ha_location}.

If a Home location is configured, latitude and longitude have been pre-filled from your Home Assistant Home zone; otherwise enter them manually. You may override the values to use a different location. The closest NWS forecast office will be suggested in the next step.

office.title: Choose NWS Forecast Office
office.description:
Select the NOAA / NWS forecast office to use for {latitude}, {longitude}. The closest office is pre-selected.

{warning}

error.invalid_office: Please choose a valid NWS forecast office.

abort.already_configured: This NOAA office and location is already configured.

init.title: NOAA It All Options
init.description:
Detected Home Assistant Home location: {ha_location}.

Update the latitude and longitude used for NOAA data. The closest NWS forecast office will be suggested in the next step.

office.title: Choose NWS Forecast Office
office.description:
Select the NOAA / NWS forecast office to use for {latitude}, {longitude}. The closest office is pre-selected.

{warning}

error.invalid_office: Please choose a valid NWS forecast office.
